CongressSettings.pageDescription: View and edit general settings for the demonstration congress.
CongressSettings.saveHint: Only existing schema fields are editable. No public site sync yet.
CongressSettings.slugReadOnlyHelper: Read-only technical identifier — do not change to avoid breaking links.

sections.generalDescription: Congress name, dates, venue, and publication status.
sections.heroDescription: Welcome copy planned for the public homepage — not published in Phase 0.
sections.scheduleDescription: Opening and closing dates for participant and scientific workflows.
sections.brandingDescription: Primary and secondary colors used by the congress theme.

errors.forbidden: You do not have permission to edit these settings.

errors.endDateBeforeStart: End date must be on or after the start date.
errors.closesBeforeOpens: Closing date must be after the opening date.

TicketSettings.pageDescription: Configure ticket categories, fees, and accommodation/travel options for the demo congress. Participant registration records are not available yet.
TicketSettings.participantListComingSoon: This page configures registration categories, fees, and accommodation/travel options only. Public participant registration is not open yet. Proof upload and payment handling are future steps.
TicketSettings.ticketTypesDescription: Overview of configured ticket categories for the congress.
TicketSettings.ticketTypesEmpty: No ticket types yet. Create one below to configure pricing.
TicketSettings.optionsEmpty: No registration options for this ticket type yet.
TicketSettings.optionsAgencyNote: Accommodation and travel options are informational. Pricing is handled later by the partner agency, which contacts participants directly. No booking or payment is processed here.
TicketSettings.createTicketTypeDescription: Add a new ticket category with pricing and eligibility rules.
TicketSettings.editTicketTypeDescription: Update pricing, eligibility, and availability for this ticket type.
TicketSettings.noDeleteNote: Deletion is not available in this phase. Deactivate a ticket type instead if you need to hide it.

fields.eligibleCategoriesHint: Select at least one category that can purchase this ticket.

errors.invalidPrice: Enter a valid price (0 or greater).
errors.eligibleCategoriesRequired: Select at least one eligible participant category.
errors.forbidden: You do not have permission to manage ticket settings.
errors.notFound: Congress or ticket type not found.
